observed_failure.surface: installed SkillGuard supervising a deeply nested PhysicsGuard skill for the first time
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the installed generic supervisor can create and own persistent check receipts for an external maintained skill
observed_failure.observed_result: the implicit owner-evidence and run-state roots were placed below already deep skill roots; the first target produced a 280-character lock path and a later target exceeded the diagnostics temporary-file budget

classification.owner: SkillGuard claimed-run CLI to run-state and owner-evidence authority binding

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the supervisor API already accepted explicit persistent owner-evidence and run-state authorities, but the public CLI did not expose either binding and therefore forced deep target-local defaults
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the external-target model had included the exact installed CLI plus a Windows path-budget case and an initially absent repository-level evidence root
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: bind one repository-level short owner-evidence root and one per-target repository-level short run-state root through the public CLI while preserving the existing single defaults when omitted
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: skillguard_supervise.main -> supervise_contract_run(run_state_root, owner_evidence_root) -> claim_run and execution_single_flight_lock

generalized_repair.rule: External targets may bind one repository-level persistent owner-receipt authority and one short per-target run-state authority; the bindings change storage location only and cannot change checks, dependencies, execution ownership, evidence truth, or closure.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: the exact installed CLI supervises every deeply nested PhysicsGuard skill using the shared PhysicsGuard receipt root and per-skill short run-state roots
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: the CLI forwards both exact requested authorities, the runtime creates previously absent trees, and omitted bindings retain the sole existing defaults
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: this does not add a supervision mode, alternate receipt format, receipt fallback, or second authority for the same run

required_revalidation: CLI run-state and owner-evidence binding regressions
first-use single-flight execution under the short repository authority
SkillGuard contract compilation and self-host closure
transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed parity
real installed supervision of the PhysicsGuard skill suite

revalidation_evidence.cli_regressions: 58 passed plus 21 subtests; explicit run-state and owner-evidence roots are forwarded and omitted roots preserve the existing defaults
revalidation_evidence.observed_first_use: physicsguard-ai-debugging executed 7 owner checks through the short work/oe authority and closed
revalidation_evidence.same_class_run_state: physicsguard-candidate-model-blueprint closed from path-budgeted work/r/02 after the long per-skill directory reproduced the diagnostic path failure
revalidation_evidence.installed_suite_replay: 10/10 PhysicsGuard skills passed with shared work/oe and short work/r/00..09 run-state roots

claim_boundary: The storage-binding repair is validated for the current Windows workspace and the 10 named PhysicsGuard targets. It does not prove arbitrary longer roots, unrelated targets, publication, or future AI behavior.
